MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: SETT CONF HELD. ACTION SETTLED. TRIAL DATE VACATED. SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD. PER STIP, DEFT OWES $2347.12 BACK RENT AND DAMAGES FOR 05-04 THROUGH 08-04;$263.30 COSTS; TOTAL:$3001.98 WHICH INCLUDES 10% INTEREST.TO BE PAID OFF IN 20 MONTHS AT $135.00 PER MONTH, EFF 9-15-04, AND EVERY MONTH ON THE 15TH OF THE MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. DEFT IS TO PAY RENT TIMELY BY CASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER ONLY. IF SHE MISSES A PAYMENT, PLTF MAY MAKE EX PARTE REQUEST FOR EVICTION. NEW LEASE TO BE SIGNED ON 9-1-04. DEFT IS TO BE SOLE OCCUPANT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE, DISMISSAL TO BE FILED. IF DEFT HAS TO LEAVE APT, ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND WILL BELONG TO PLTF. IF THERE IS A JUDGMENT, SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE WAIVED AND APPLIED TO BACK RENT.PLTF'S CSL:RONALD MARC ARLAS,ESQ;DEFT IN PRO PER;JUDGE PRO TEM-IRGING FFEFFER;CLERK-BBS;REPORTER-JO ANN BRYCE; (DEPT. 218)
